---
title: ""
format: html
listing: 
  contents: 
   - "videos/*.qmd"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  fields: [title, image, date, categories, title, subtitle]
  sort-ui: [title, date] # Agregar barra de orden
  filter-ui: [title, date] # Agregar barra de filtrado
---

## Press coverage of publications

## **Popular science articles**
